meaning: 巴基西梅托[委内瑞拉西北部城市]
examples: He started as a boy member of the children's orchestra in his hometown 12 Barquisimeto.
The professional services industry, in good faith for the vast number of visitors Beijing friends to provide special fares to Barquisimeto.
The director of Barquisimeto hospital, Ruy Medina, put the death toll at 54, Venezuela's Clarin newspaper reported.
Earlier his wife, Marisabel, and children had left Caracas in the cover of darkness on a PDVSA jet for Barquisimeto in western Venezuela.
